144: function isWalFallbackError(error: unknown): boolean {
145:   const code = (error as { code?: string }).code ?? '';
146:   // better-sqlite3/libsqlite3 on SQLite 3.x may surface base or extended result codes.
147:   return /^(?:SQLITE_READONLY|SQLITE_CANTOPEN|SQLITE_IOERR)(?:_|$)/.test(code)
148:     || code === 'EACCES'
149:     || code === 'EROFS'
150:     || code === 'EPERM'
151:     || code === 'ENOSPC';
152: }

218: export function resolveSkillGraphDbDir(): string {
219:   const overrideDbDir = process.env.MK_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR ?? process.env.SYSTEM_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR;
220:   if (overrideDbDir) {
221:     return resolve(overrideDbDir);
222:   }
223:   return resolve(
224:     process.cwd(),
225:     '.opencode',
226:     'skills',

228:     'mcp_server',

237: const CORRUPTION_REASON_PATTERN = /SQLITE_CORRUPT|SQLITE_NOTADB|database disk image is malformed|file is not a database|malformed/i;
238: const TRANSIENT_REASON_PATTERN = /database is locked|SQLITE_BUSY|SQLITE_LOCKED|SQLITE_PROTOCOL|EIO|EPERM|EACCES|EROFS|ENOSPC/i;
239: 
240: /**
241:  * Only genuine on-disk corruption may trigger destructive recovery.
242:  *
243:  * Transient conditions (lock contention from a concurrent daemon, I/O or
244:  * permission errors) must never rename/delete the live database out from
245:  * under its owner, so they fail this check and initDb proceeds to a normal
246:  * open (busy_timeout handles contention).
247:  */
248: export function isGenuineCorruptionReason(reason: string): boolean {
249:   if (reason.startsWith('SQLITE_CHECK_FAILED') || TRANSIENT_REASON_PATTERN.test(reason)) {
250:     return false;
251:   }
252:   // quick_check completed and reported integrity violations
253:   if (reason.startsWith('SQLITE_QUICK_CHECK_')) {
254:     return true;
255:   }
256:   return CORRUPTION_REASON_PATTERN.test(reason);
257: }
258: 
259: function recoverMalformedDatabase(databasePath: string, reason: string): void {
260:   if (!existsSync(databasePath)) {
261:     return;
262:   }
263: 
264:   const backupPath = join(dirname(databasePath), `${DB_FILENAME}.${Date.now()}.corrupt`);
265:   try {
266:     renameSync(databasePath, backupPath);
267:   } catch {
268:     rmSync(databasePath, { force: true });
269:   }
270:   console.warn(`[skill-graph] Recovered malformed SQLite database via initDb quick_check (${reason})`);
271: }
272: 
273: function ensureSchemaMigrations(database: Database.Database): void {
274:   ensureVecMetadataTable(database);
275:   ensureVecTableForDim(database, 768);
276:   ensureVecTableForDim(database, 1024);
277: 
278:   database.exec(`
279:     CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_graph_metadata (
280:       key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
281:       value TEXT,
282:       updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
283:     );
284:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_nodes_family ON skill_nodes(family);
285:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_edges_source ON skill_edges(source_id, edge_type);
286:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_edges_target ON skill_edges(target_id, edge_type);
287:   `);
288: 
289:   const columns = new Set(
290:     (database.prepare('PRAGMA table_info(skill_nodes)').all() as Array<{ name: string }>)
291:       .map((column) => column.name),
292:   );
293:   if (!columns.has('embedding')) {
294:     database.exec('ALTER TABLE skill_nodes ADD COLUMN embedding BLOB');
295:   }
296:   if (!columns.has('embedding_model_id')) {
297:     database.exec('ALTER TABLE skill_nodes ADD COLUMN embedding_model_id TEXT');
298:   }
299:   if (!columns.has('embedding_content_hash')) {
300:     database.exec('ALTER TABLE skill_nodes ADD COLUMN embedding_content_hash TEXT');
301:   }
302:   database.exec(`
303:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_nodes_embedding_model ON skill_nodes(embedding_model_id);
304:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_nodes_embedding_hash ON skill_nodes(embedding_content_hash);
305:   `);
306: }

308: /** Initialize (or get) the skill graph database. */
309: export function initDb(dbDir: string): Database.Database {
310:   if (db) return db;
311: 
312:   try {
313:     mkdirSync(dbDir, { recursive: true });
314:     dbPath = join(dbDir, DB_FILENAME);
315:     const integrity = checkSqliteIntegrity(dbPath);
316:     if (!integrity.ok && integrity.reason !== 'SQLITE_ABSENT' && isGenuineCorruptionReason(integrity.reason)) {
317:       recoverMalformedDatabase(dbPath, integrity.reason);
318:     }
319:     db = new Database(dbPath);
320:     db.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000');
321:     try {
322:       db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');
323:     } catch (error: unknown) {
324:       const code = (error as { code?: string }).code ?? '';
325:       if (isWalFallbackError(error)) {
326:         console.warn(`[skill-graph] WAL mode unavailable (${code}); falling back to journal_mode=DELETE. Concurrent readers may stall during writes; performance degraded vs WAL mode.`);
327:         db.pragma('journal_mode = DELETE');
328:       } else {
329:         throw error;
330:       }
331:     }
332:     db.pragma('foreign_keys = ON');
333:     db.exec(SCHEMA_SQL);
334:     ensureSchemaMigrations(db);
335: 
336:     const versionRow = db.prepare('SELECT version FROM schema_version LIMIT 1').get() as { version: number } | undefined;
337:     if (!versionRow) {
338:       db.prepare('INSERT INTO schema_version (version) VALUES (?)').run(SCHEMA_VERSION);
339:     } else if (versionRow.version < SCHEMA_VERSION) {
340:       db.prepare('UPDATE schema_version SET version = ?').run(SCHEMA_VERSION);
341:     }
342: 
343:     return db;
344:   } catch (error) {
345:     if (db) {
346:       try { db.close(); } catch { /* best effort cleanup for failed init */ }
347:     }
348:     db = null;
349:     dbPath = null;
350:     throw error;
351:   }
352: }
353: 
354: /** Get the current database instance (lazy-initializes if needed). */
355: export function getDb(): Database.Database {
356:   if (!db) initDb(resolveSkillGraphDbDir());
357:   return db!;
358: }
359: 
360: /**
361:  * Read-only database access for recommend-path consumers (semantic shadow
362:  * lane). Never creates the database file, never runs schema migrations, and
363:  * never triggers malformed-database recovery, so secondary/bridge processes
364:  * cannot become a second writer on the daemon-owned skill graph. Reuses the
365:  * read-write handle when this process already owns one (daemon path).
366:  * Returns null when the database file is absent or unopenable; callers must
367:  * degrade gracefully (no shadow scoring).
368:  */
369: export function getDbReadOnly(): Database.Database | null {
370:   if (db) return db;
371:   if (readOnlyDb) return readOnlyDb;
372: 
373:   const databasePath = join(resolveSkillGraphDbDir(), DB_FILENAME);
374:   if (!existsSync(databasePath)) {
375:     return null;
376:   }
377: 
378:   try {
379:     const handle = new Database(databasePath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true });
380:     handle.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000');
381:     readOnlyDb = handle;
382:     return readOnlyDb;
383:   } catch (error: unknown) {
384:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
385:     console.warn(`[skill-graph] Read-only open failed (${message}); shadow scoring degraded for this process`);
386:     return null;
387:   }
388: }
389: 
390: /** Close the database connection. */
391: export function closeDb(): void {
392:   if (db) {
393:     db.close();
394:     db = null;
395:     dbPath = null;
396:   }
397:   if (readOnlyDb) {
398:     try {
399:       readOnlyDb.close();
400:     } catch { /* best effort: read-only handle teardown */ }
401:     readOnlyDb = null;
402:   }
403: }

443: 
444: function isRecord(value: unknown): value is JsonRecord {
445:   return typeof value === 'object' && value !== null && !Array.isArray(value);
446: }
447: 
448: function toDisplayPath(filePath: string): string {
449:   const relativePath = relative(process.cwd(), filePath);
450:   return relativePath && !relativePath.startsWith('..') ? relativePath : filePath;
451: }
452: 
453: function requireString(value: unknown, fieldName: string, sourcePath: string): string {
454:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim().length === 0) {
455:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: ${fieldName} must be a non-empty string`);
456:   }
457:   return value;
458: }
459: 
460: function requireStringArray(value: unknown, fieldName: string, sourcePath: string): string[] {
461:   if (!Array.isArray(value) || value.some((entry) => typeof entry !== 'string')) {
462:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: ${fieldName} must be an array of strings`);
463:   }
464:   return value;
465: }
466: 
467: function requireDerived(value: unknown, schemaVersion: number, sourcePath: string): JsonRecord | null {
468:   if (schemaVersion === 1) {
469:     return isRecord(value) ? value : null;
470:   }
471: 
472:   if (!isRecord(value)) {
473:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: schema_version 2 requires a derived object`);
474:   }
475: 
476:   return value;
477: }
478: 
479: function requireEdgeWeight(value: unknown, edgeType: SkillEdgeType, sourcePath: string): number {
480:   if (typeof value !== 'number' || Number.isNaN(value)) {
481:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: ${edgeType} edge weight must be a number`);
482:   }
483: 
484:   if (value < MIN_WEIGHT || value > MAX_WEIGHT) {
485:     throw new Error(
486:       `${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: ${edgeType} edge weight ${value} out of range [${MIN_WEIGHT}, ${MAX_WEIGHT}]`,
487:     );
488:   }
489: 
490:   return value;
491: }
492: 
493: function warnWeightBand(edge: SkillEdge, sourcePath: string, warnings: string[]): void {
494:   const [minBand, maxBand] = WEIGHT_BANDS[edge.edgeType];
495:   if (edge.weight >= minBand && edge.weight <= maxBand) {
496:     return;
497:   }
498: 
499:   const warning = `WEIGHT-BAND: ${edge.sourceId} ${edge.edgeType} ${edge.targetId} weight ${edge.weight} ` +
500:     `outside recommended band [${minBand}, ${maxBand}] (${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)})`;
501:   warnings.push(warning);
502:   console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
503: }

505: function computeContentHash(content: string): string {
506:   return createHash('sha256').update(content).digest('hex');
507: }
508: 
509: function encodeEmbedding(vector: Float32Array | readonly number[]): Buffer {
510:   const array = vector instanceof Float32Array ? vector : Float32Array.from(vector);
511:   return Buffer.from(array.buffer, array.byteOffset, array.byteLength);
512: }
513: 
514: function decodeEmbedding(blob: Buffer): Float32Array | null {
515:   if (blob.byteLength === 0 || blob.byteLength % Float32Array.BYTES_PER_ELEMENT !== 0) {
516:     return null;
517:   }
518:   const copied = blob.buffer.slice(blob.byteOffset, blob.byteOffset + blob.byteLength);
519:   return new Float32Array(copied);
520: }

522: function skillDescriptionForEmbedding(sourcePath: string): string {
523:   const skillMdPath = join(dirname(sourcePath), 'SKILL.md');
524:   if (!existsSync(skillMdPath)) {

526:   }
527:   const parsed = parseSkillFrontmatter(readFileSync(skillMdPath, 'utf8'));

531: function providerModelId(profile: { provider: string; model: string; dim: number; dtype?: string | null; slug?: string }): string {
532:   return profile.slug ?? [profile.provider, profile.model, profile.dim, profile.dtype ?? null]
533:     .filter((part): part is string | number => part !== null && part !== undefined && part !== '')

537: function discoverGraphMetadataFiles(skillDir: string): string[] {
538:   if (!existsSync(skillDir)) {
539:     return [];
540:   }
541: 
542:   const discovered: string[] = [];
543:   const stack: string[] = [skillDir];
544: 
545:   while (stack.length > 0) {
546:     const currentDir = stack.pop()!;
547:     const entries = readdirSync(currentDir, { withFileTypes: true });
548:     for (const entry of entries) {
549:       const entryPath = join(currentDir, entry.name);
550:       if (entry.isDirectory()) {
551:         stack.push(entryPath);
552:         continue;
553:       }
554: 
555:       if (entry.isFile() && entry.name === SKILL_METADATA_FILENAME) {
556:         discovered.push(entryPath);
557:       }
558:     }
559:   }
560: 
561:   return discovered.sort((left, right) => left.localeCompare(right));
562: }

564: function readMetadataJson(sourcePath: string, content: string): JsonRecord {
565:   let parsedJson: unknown;
566:   try {
567:     parsedJson = JSON.parse(content) as unknown;
568:   } catch (error: unknown) {
569:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
570:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: failed to parse JSON (${message})`);
571:   }
572: 
573:   if (!isRecord(parsedJson)) {
574:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: root must be an object`);
575:   }
576: 
577:   return parsedJson;
578: }

580: function isSkillGraphMetadata(parsedJson: JsonRecord): boolean {
581:   return typeof parsedJson.skill_id === 'string' || typeof parsedJson.family === 'string' || isRecord(parsedJson.edges);
582: }

584: function parseSkillMetadata(sourcePath: string, parsedJson: JsonRecord, contentHash: string): ParsedSkillMetadata {
585:   const schemaVersion = parsedJson.schema_version;
586:   if (schemaVersion !== 1 && schemaVersion !== 2) {
587:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: schema_version must be 1 or 2`);
588:   }
589: 
590:   const skillId = requireString(parsedJson.skill_id, 'skill_id', sourcePath);
591:   const folderName = basename(dirname(sourcePath));
592:   if (skillId !== folderName) {
593:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: skill_id "${skillId}" does not match folder name "${folderName}"`);
594:   }
595: 
596:   const family = requireString(parsedJson.family, 'family', sourcePath);
597:   if (!ALLOWED_FAMILIES.includes(family as SkillFamily)) {
598:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: family "${family}" is not supported`);
599:   }
600: 
601:   const category = requireString(parsedJson.category, 'category', sourcePath);
602:   const domains = requireStringArray(parsedJson.domains, 'domains', sourcePath);
603:   const intentSignals = requireStringArray(parsedJson.intent_signals, 'intent_signals', sourcePath);
604:   const derived = requireDerived(parsedJson.derived, schemaVersion, sourcePath);
605: 
606:   if (!isRecord(parsedJson.edges)) {
607:     throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: edges must be an object`);
608:   }
609: 
610:   const edges: SkillEdge[] = [];
611:   for (const edgeType of EDGE_TYPES) {
612:     const rawEdgeList = parsedJson.edges[edgeType];
613:     if (rawEdgeList === undefined) {
614:       continue;
615:     }
616: 
617:     if (!Array.isArray(rawEdgeList)) {
618:       throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: edges.${edgeType} must be an array`);
619:     }
620: 
621:     for (const rawEdge of rawEdgeList) {
622:       if (!isRecord(rawEdge)) {
623:         throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: edges.${edgeType} entries must be objects`);
624:       }
625: 
626:       edges.push({
627:         sourceId: skillId,
628:         targetId: requireString(rawEdge.target, `edges.${edgeType}.target`, sourcePath),
629:         edgeType,
630:         weight: requireEdgeWeight(rawEdge.weight, edgeType, sourcePath),
631:         context: requireString(rawEdge.context, `edges.${edgeType}.context`, sourcePath),
632:       });
633:     }
634:   }
635: 
636:   for (const key of Object.keys(parsedJson.edges)) {
637:     if (!EDGE_TYPES.includes(key as SkillEdgeType)) {
638:       throw new Error(`${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}: unsupported edge type "${key}"`);
639:     }
640:   }
641: 
642:   return {
643:     node: {
644:       id: skillId,
645:       family: family as SkillFamily,
646:       category,
647:       schemaVersion,
648:       domains,
649:       intentSignals,
650:       derived,
651:       sourcePath,
652:       contentHash,
653:     },
654:     edges,
655:   };
656: }
657: 
658: function deleteMissingNodes(database: Database.Database, skillIds: string[]): number {
659:   if (skillIds.length === 0) {
660:     const result = database.prepare('DELETE FROM skill_nodes').run();
661:     return result.changes;
662:   }
663: 
664:   const placeholders = skillIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
665:   const result = database.prepare(`DELETE FROM skill_nodes WHERE id NOT IN (${placeholders})`).run(...skillIds);
666:   return result.changes;
667: }
668: 
669: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
670: // 7. INDEXER
671: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
672: 
673: /**
674:  * Index all discovered graph-metadata.json files under a skill directory.
675:  *
676:  * Files whose SHA-256 content hash has not changed are skipped. Node rows that
677:  * disappear from the source directory are deleted first so foreign-key cascade
678:  * cleanup removes stale edges, even when neighboring source files are skipped.
679:  */
680: export function indexSkillMetadata(skillDir: string): SkillGraphIndexResult {
681:   const database = getDb();
682:   const discoveredFiles = discoverGraphMetadataFiles(skillDir);
683:   const parsedMetadata: ParsedSkillMetadata[] = [];
684:   const warnings: string[] = [];
685:   let nonSkillMetadataFiles = 0;
686: 
687:   for (const sourcePath of discoveredFiles) {
688:     const content = readFileSync(sourcePath, 'utf8');
689:     const parsedJson = readMetadataJson(sourcePath, content);
690:     if (!isSkillGraphMetadata(parsedJson)) {
691:       nonSkillMetadataFiles++;
692:       warnings.push(`NON-SKILL-METADATA: skipped ${toDisplayPath(sourcePath)}`);
693:       continue;
694:     }
695: 
696:     const contentHash = computeContentHash(content);
697:     parsedMetadata.push(parseSkillMetadata(sourcePath, parsedJson, contentHash));
698:   }
699: 
700:   const skillIds = parsedMetadata.map((entry) => entry.node.id);
701:   const duplicateIds = new Set<string>();
702:   const seenIds = new Set<string>();
703:   for (const skillId of skillIds) {
704:     if (seenIds.has(skillId)) {
705:       duplicateIds.add(skillId);
706:       continue;
707:     }
708:     seenIds.add(skillId);
709:   }
710:   if (duplicateIds.size > 0) {
711:     throw new Error(`Duplicate skill_ids discovered: ${[...duplicateIds].sort().join(', ')}`);
712:   }
713: 
714:   let indexedFiles = 0;
715:   let skippedFiles = nonSkillMetadataFiles;
716:   let indexedNodes = 0;
717:   let indexedEdges = 0;
718:   let rejectedEdges = 0;
719:   let deletedNodes = 0;
720: 
721:   if (skillIds.length === 0) {
722:     warnings.push(`EMPTY-SKILL-SCAN: no skill metadata discovered under ${toDisplayPath(skillDir)}; preserving existing graph`);
723:     const summary: SkillGraphIndexResult = {
724:       scannedFiles: discoveredFiles.length,
725:       indexedFiles,
726:       skippedFiles,
727:       indexedNodes,
728:       indexedEdges,
729:       rejectedEdges,
730:       deletedNodes,
731:       warnings,
732:     };
733: 
734:     setMetadata('last_scan_timestamp', new Date().toISOString());
735:     setMetadata('last_scan_skill_dir', skillDir);
736:     setMetadata('last_scan_summary', JSON.stringify(summary));
737:     checkpointWal(database);
738: 
739:     return summary;
740:   }
741: 
742:   const knownSkillIds = new Set(skillIds);
743: 
744:   const selectExisting = database.prepare(`
745:     SELECT content_hash, source_path
746:     FROM skill_nodes
747:     WHERE id = ?
748:   `);
749:   const upsertNode = database.prepare(`
750:     INSERT INTO skill_nodes (
751:       id, family, category, schema_version, domains, intent_signals, derived,
752:       source_path, content_hash, indexed_at
753:     )
754:     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
755:     ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
756:       family = excluded.family,
757:       category = excluded.category,
758:       schema_version = excluded.schema_version,
759:       domains = excluded.domains,
760:       intent_signals = excluded.intent_signals,
761:       derived = excluded.derived,
762:       source_path = excluded.source_path,
763:       content_hash = excluded.content_hash,
764:       indexed_at = excluded.indexed_at
765:   `);
766:   const deleteEdgesBySource = database.prepare('DELETE FROM skill_edges WHERE source_id = ?');
767:   const insertEdge = database.prepare(`
768:     INSERT INTO skill_edges (source_id, target_id, edge_type, weight, context)
769:     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
770:     ON CONFLICT(source_id, target_id, edge_type) DO UPDATE SET
771:       weight = excluded.weight,
772:       context = excluded.context
773:   `);
774: 
775:   const tx = database.transaction(() => {
776:     deletedNodes = deleteMissingNodes(database, skillIds);
777: 
778:     const changedEntries: ParsedSkillMetadata[] = [];
779:     for (const entry of parsedMetadata) {
780:       const now = new Date().toISOString();
781:       const existing = selectExisting.get(entry.node.id) as {
782:         content_hash: string;
783:         source_path: string;
784:       } | undefined;
785: 
786:       if (
787:         existing &&
788:         existing.content_hash === entry.node.contentHash &&
789:         existing.source_path === entry.node.sourcePath
790:       ) {
791:         skippedFiles++;
792:         continue;
793:       }
794: 
795:       upsertNode.run(
796:         entry.node.id,
797:         entry.node.family,
798:         entry.node.category,
799:         entry.node.schemaVersion,
800:         JSON.stringify(entry.node.domains),
801:         JSON.stringify(entry.node.intentSignals),
802:         entry.node.derived ? JSON.stringify(entry.node.derived) : null,
803:         entry.node.sourcePath,
804:         entry.node.contentHash,
805:         now,
806:       );
807: 
808:       indexedFiles++;
809:       indexedNodes++;
810:       changedEntries.push(entry);
811:     }
812: 
813:     // Re-publish every source edge after all nodes are known so previously
814:     // rejected edges can backfill when a target skill appears in a later scan.
815:     for (const entry of parsedMetadata) {
816:       deleteEdgesBySource.run(entry.node.id);
817: 
818:       for (const edge of entry.edges) {
819:         warnWeightBand(edge, entry.node.sourcePath, warnings);
820: 
821:         if (edge.sourceId === edge.targetId) {
822:           rejectedEdges++;
823:           const warning = `SELF-LOOP: rejected ${edge.sourceId} ${edge.edgeType} ${edge.targetId} (${toDisplayPath(entry.node.sourcePath)})`;
824:           warnings.push(warning);
825:           console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
826:           continue;
827:         }
828: 
829:         if (!knownSkillIds.has(edge.targetId)) {
830:           rejectedEdges++;
831:           const warning = `UNKNOWN-TARGET: rejected ${edge.sourceId} ${edge.edgeType} ${edge.targetId} (${toDisplayPath(entry.node.sourcePath)})`;
832:           warnings.push(warning);
833:           console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
834:           continue;
835:         }
836: 
837:         insertEdge.run(edge.sourceId, edge.targetId, edge.edgeType, edge.weight, edge.context);
838:         indexedEdges++;
839:       }
840:     }
841:   });
842: 
843:   tx();
844: 
845:   const summary: SkillGraphIndexResult = {
846:     scannedFiles: discoveredFiles.length,
847:     indexedFiles,
848:     skippedFiles,
849:     indexedNodes,
850:     indexedEdges,
851:     rejectedEdges,
852:     deletedNodes,
853:     warnings,
854:   };
855: 
856:   setMetadata('last_scan_timestamp', new Date().toISOString());
857:   setMetadata('last_scan_skill_dir', skillDir);
858:   setMetadata('last_scan_summary', JSON.stringify(summary));
859:   checkpointWal(database);
860: 
861:   return summary;
862: }
863: 
864: /**
865:  * Refresh embeddings for skill_nodes rows.
866:  *
867:  * Dual-path dispatch:
868:  * - When `hasActiveEmbedderPointer(database)` returns true: use the pluggable
869:  * EmbedderAdapter layer — embed via `getAdapter(active.name)` and
870:  *   write to `vec_<active.dim>` table via INSERT OR REPLACE.
871:  * - When the pointer is unset (fresh install / pre-pluggable state): keep the
872:  *   legacy path — embed via `createEmbeddingsProvider()` factory and write to
873:  *   the `skill_nodes.embedding` BLOB column.
874:  *
875:  * The legacy column is retained for backward compatibility; the reader
876:  * (`loadSkillEmbeddings`) already prefers `vec_<dim>` when the pointer is set,
877:  * so once the adapter path populates `vec_<dim>`, the legacy column becomes
878:  * stale-but-harmless. A separate "legacy embedding column deprecation" packet
879:  * may remove it once all installs have migrated.
880:  */
881: export async function refreshSkillEmbeddings(skillDir?: string): Promise<SkillEmbeddingRefreshResult> {
882:   const database = getDb();
883: 
884:   if (hasActiveEmbedderPointer(database)) {
885:     return refreshSkillEmbeddingsViaAdapter(database, skillDir);
886:   }
887: 
888:   return refreshSkillEmbeddingsLegacy(database, skillDir);
889: }
890: 
891: async function refreshSkillEmbeddingsViaAdapter(
892:   database: Database.Database,
893:   skillDir: string | undefined,
894: ): Promise<SkillEmbeddingRefreshResult> {
895:   const active = getActiveEmbedder(database);
896:   ensureVecTableForDim(database, active.dim);
897:   const tableName = vecTableNameForDim(active.dim);
898:   let adapter: EmbedderAdapter;
899:   try {
900:     const resolved = getAdapter(active.name);
901:     if (!resolved) {
902:       const warning = `ADAPTER-UNAVAILABLE: ${active.name} (manifest not found in registry)`;
903:       console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
904:       // F review P2-1: failed = total skill_nodes count so refresh-watchers
905:       // see an outage signal instead of "0 failed / 0 skipped" which looks
906:       // like an empty corpus.
907:       const rowCount = (database.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM skill_nodes').get() as { c: number }).c;
908:       return { embedded: 0, skipped: 0, failed: rowCount, warnings: [warning] };
909:     }
910:     adapter = resolved;
911:   } catch (error: unknown) {
912:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
913:     const warning = `ADAPTER-UNAVAILABLE: ${active.name} (${message})`;
914:     console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
915:     const rowCount = (database.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM skill_nodes').get() as { c: number }).c;
916:     return { embedded: 0, skipped: 0, failed: rowCount, warnings: [warning] };
917:   }
918: 
919:   // F review P1-1: fail fast on adapter-vs-pointer dim mismatch instead of
920:   // per-row EMBEDDING-FAILED noise + accidental vec_<dim> table emptying.
921:   if (adapter.dim !== active.dim) {
922:     const warning = `ADAPTER-DIM-MISMATCH: ${active.name} reports dim=${adapter.dim} but vec_metadata pointer dim=${active.dim}; fix configuration before refresh`;
923:     console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
924:     const rowCount = (database.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM skill_nodes').get() as { c: number }).c;
925:     return { embedded: 0, skipped: 0, failed: rowCount, warnings: [warning] };
926:   }
927:   const modelId = active.name;
928:   const warnings: string[] = [];
929:   let embedded = 0;
930:   let skipped = 0;
931:   let failed = 0;
932: 
933:   const rows = database.prepare(`
934:     SELECT n.id AS id,
935:            n.source_path AS source_path,
936:            v.embedding AS vec_embedding,
937:            v.model_id AS vec_model_id,
938:            v.content_hash AS vec_content_hash
939:     FROM skill_nodes n
940:     LEFT JOIN ${tableName} v ON v.skill_id = n.id
941:     ORDER BY n.id ASC
942:   `).all() as Array<{
943:     id: string;
944:     source_path: string;
945:     vec_embedding: Buffer | null;
946:     vec_model_id: string | null;
947:     vec_content_hash: string | null;
948:   }>;
949: 
950:   const upsertEmbedding = database.prepare(`
951:     INSERT INTO ${tableName} (skill_id, embedding, model_id, content_hash, updated_at)
952:     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, datetime('now'))
953:     ON CONFLICT(skill_id) DO UPDATE SET
954:       embedding = excluded.embedding,
955:       model_id = excluded.model_id,
956:       content_hash = excluded.content_hash,
957:       updated_at = datetime('now')
958:   `);
959:   const deleteEmbedding = database.prepare(`DELETE FROM ${tableName} WHERE skill_id = ?`);
960: 
961:   for (const row of rows) {
962:     if (skillDir && !row.source_path.startsWith(skillDir)) {
963:       skipped++;
964:       continue;
965:     }
966: 
967:     const description = skillDescriptionForEmbedding(row.source_path).trim();
968:     if (!description) {
969:       deleteEmbedding.run(row.id);
970:       skipped++;
971:       continue;
972:     }
973: 
974:     const contentHash = computeContentHash(description);
975:     if (
976:       row.vec_embedding
977:       && row.vec_model_id === modelId
978:       && row.vec_content_hash === contentHash
979:     ) {
980:       skipped++;
981:       continue;
982:     }
983: 
984:     try {
985:       const vectors = await adapter.embed([description], { inputType: 'document' });
986:       const vector = vectors[0];
987:       if (!vector || vector.length !== active.dim) {
988:         throw new Error(`adapter returned vector of length ${vector?.length ?? 0}, expected ${active.dim}`);
989:       }
990:       upsertEmbedding.run(row.id, encodeEmbedding(vector), modelId, contentHash);
991:       embedded++;
992:     } catch (error: unknown) {
993:       failed++;
994:       deleteEmbedding.run(row.id);
995:       const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
996:       const warning = `EMBEDDING-FAILED: ${row.id} (${message})`;
997:       warnings.push(warning);
998:       console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
999:     }
1000:   }
1001: 
1002:   return { embedded, skipped, failed, warnings };
1003: }
1004: 
1005: async function refreshSkillEmbeddingsLegacy(
1006:   database: Database.Database,
1007:   skillDir: string | undefined,
1008: ): Promise<SkillEmbeddingRefreshResult> {
1009:   const provider = await createEmbeddingsProvider();
1010:   const modelId = providerModelId(provider.getProfile());
1011:   const warnings: string[] = [];
1012:   let embedded = 0;
1013:   let skipped = 0;
1014:   let failed = 0;
1015: 
1016:   const rows = database.prepare(`
1017:     SELECT id, source_path, embedding, embedding_model_id, embedding_content_hash
1018:     FROM skill_nodes
1019:     ORDER BY id ASC
1020:   `).all() as Array<{
1021:     id: string;
1022:     source_path: string;
1023:     embedding: Buffer | null;
1024:     embedding_model_id: string | null;
1025:     embedding_content_hash: string | null;
1026:   }>;
1027:   const updateEmbedding = database.prepare(`
1028:     UPDATE skill_nodes
1029:     SET embedding = ?, embedding_model_id = ?, embedding_content_hash = ?
1030:     WHERE id = ?
1031:   `);
1032: 
1033:   for (const row of rows) {
1034:     if (skillDir && !row.source_path.startsWith(skillDir)) {
1035:       skipped++;
1036:       continue;
1037:     }
1038: 
1039:     const description = skillDescriptionForEmbedding(row.source_path).trim();
1040:     if (!description) {
1041:       updateEmbedding.run(null, null, null, row.id);
1042:       skipped++;
1043:       continue;
1044:     }
1045: 
1046:     const contentHash = computeContentHash(description);
1047:     if (
1048:       row.embedding
1049:       && row.embedding_model_id === modelId
1050:       && row.embedding_content_hash === contentHash
1051:     ) {
1052:       skipped++;
1053:       continue;

1057:       const vector = await provider.embedDocument(description);
1058:       if (!vector) {
1059:         throw new Error('provider returned no vector');
1060:       }
1061:       updateEmbedding.run(encodeEmbedding(vector), modelId, contentHash, row.id);
1062:       embedded++;
1063:     } catch (error: unknown) {
1064:       failed++;
1065:       updateEmbedding.run(null, modelId, contentHash, row.id);
1066:       const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1067:       const warning = `EMBEDDING-FAILED: ${row.id} (${message})`;
1068:       warnings.push(warning);
1069:       console.warn(`[skill-graph] ${warning}`);
1070:     }
1071:   }
1072: 
1073:   return { embedded, skipped, failed, warnings };
1074: }

1076: export function loadSkillEmbeddings(skillIds?: readonly string[]): SkillEmbeddingRow[] {
1077:   // Recommend-path read: must not lazily create or migrate the database.
1078:   // Absent database means no embeddings; the shadow lane degrades to empty.
1079:   const database = getDbReadOnly();
1080:   if (!database) {
1081:     return [];
1082:   }
1083:   if (hasActiveEmbedderPointer(database)) {
1084:     const active = getActiveEmbedder(database);
1085:     const tableName = vecTableNameForDim(active.dim);
1086:     ensureVecTableForDim(database, active.dim);
1087: 
1088:     const activeRows = skillIds && skillIds.length > 0
1089:       ? database.prepare(`
1090:           SELECT skill_id, embedding, model_id, content_hash
1091:           FROM ${tableName}
1092:           WHERE skill_id IN (${skillIds.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
1093:           ORDER BY skill_id ASC
1094:         `).all(...skillIds)
1095:       : database.prepare(`
1096:           SELECT skill_id, embedding, model_id, content_hash
1097:           FROM ${tableName}
1098:           ORDER BY skill_id ASC
1099:         `).all();
1100: 
1101:     return (activeRows as Array<{
1102:       skill_id: string;
1103:       embedding: Buffer;
1104:       model_id: string;
1105:       content_hash: string;
1106:     }>)
1107:       .map((row) => {
1108:         const embedding = decodeEmbedding(row.embedding);
1109:         return embedding
1110:           ? {
1111:               skillId: row.skill_id,
1112:               embedding,
1113:               modelId: row.model_id,
1114:               contentHash: row.content_hash,
1115:             }
1116:           : null;
1117:       })
1118:       .filter((row): row is SkillEmbeddingRow => row !== null);
1119:   }
1120: 
1121:   const rows = skillIds && skillIds.length > 0
1122:     ? database.prepare(`
1123:         SELECT id, embedding, embedding_model_id, embedding_content_hash
1124:         FROM skill_nodes
1125:         WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
1126:           AND id IN (${skillIds.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
1127:         ORDER BY id ASC
1128:       `).all(...skillIds)
1129:     : database.prepare(`
1130:         SELECT id, embedding, embedding_model_id, embedding_content_hash
1131:         FROM skill_nodes
1132:         WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
1133:         ORDER BY id ASC
1134:       `).all();
1135: 
1136:   return (rows as Array<{
1137:     id: string;
1138:     embedding: Buffer;
1139:     embedding_model_id: string | null;
1140:     embedding_content_hash: string | null;
1141:   }>)
1142:     .map((row) => {
1143:       const embedding = decodeEmbedding(row.embedding);
1144:       return embedding && row.embedding_model_id && row.embedding_content_hash
1145:         ? {
1146:             skillId: row.id,
1147:             embedding,
1148:             modelId: row.embedding_model_id,
1149:             contentHash: row.embedding_content_hash,
1150:           }
1151:         : null;
1152:     })
1153:     .filter((row): row is SkillEmbeddingRow => row !== null);
1154: }

1160: /** Get graph statistics. */
1161: export function getStats(): SkillGraphStats {
1162:   const database = getDb();
1163:   const totalNodes = (database.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM skill_nodes').get() as { c: number }).c;
1164:   const totalEdges = (database.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM skill_edges').get() as { c: number }).c;
1165: 
1166:   const nodesByFamily: Record<string, number> = {};
1167:   const familyRows = database.prepare(`
1168:     SELECT family, COUNT(*) as c
1169:     FROM skill_nodes
1170:     GROUP BY family
1171:   `).all() as Array<{ family: string; c: number }>;
1172:   for (const row of familyRows) {
1173:     nodesByFamily[row.family] = row.c;
1174:   }
1175: 
1176:   const edgesByType: Record<string, number> = {};
1177:   const edgeRows = database.prepare(`
1178:     SELECT edge_type, COUNT(*) as c
1179:     FROM skill_edges
1180:     GROUP BY edge_type
1181:   `).all() as Array<{ edge_type: string; c: number }>;
1182:   for (const row of edgeRows) {
1183:     edgesByType[row.edge_type] = row.c;
1184:   }
1185: 
1186:   let dbFileSize: number | null = null;
1187:   if (dbPath) {
1188:     try { dbFileSize = statSync(dbPath).size; } catch { /* file may not exist yet */ }
1189:   }
1190: 
1191:   return {
1192:     totalNodes,
1193:     totalEdges,
1194:     nodesByFamily,
1195:     edgesByType,
1196:     lastScanTimestamp: getLastScanTimestamp(),
1197:     dbFileSize,
1198:     schemaVersion: SCHEMA_VERSION,
1199:   };

1205: 
1206: export function rowToSkillNode(row: Record<string, unknown>): SkillNode {
1207:   return {

1: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // MODULE: Skill Graph Queries
3: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
4: // Query helpers for the SQLite-backed skill graph.
5: // Uses prepared statements and mirrors the structural graph query patterns.
6: 
7: import type Database from 'better-sqlite3';
8: import {
9:   getDb,
10:   rowToSkillEdge,
11:   rowToSkillNode,
12:   type SkillEdge,
13:   type SkillFamily,
14:   type SkillNode,
15: } from './skill-graph-db.js';
16: 
17: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
18: // 1. TYPES
19: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
20: 
21: export interface SkillGraphRelation {
22:   node: SkillNode;
23:   edge: SkillEdge;
24:   direction: 'inbound' | 'outbound';
25: }
26: 
27: export interface SkillGraphPath {
28:   nodes: SkillNode[];
29:   edges: SkillEdge[];
30: }
31: 
32: export interface SkillGraphHub {
33:   node: SkillNode;
34:   inboundCount: number;
35: }
36: 
37: export interface SkillGraphSubgraph {
38:   nodes: SkillNode[];
39:   edges: SkillEdge[];
40: }
41: 
42: interface PreparedStatements {
43:   nodeById: Database.Statement;
44:   dependsOn: Database.Statement;
45:   dependents: Database.Statement;
46:   enhances: Database.Statement;
47:   enhancedBy: Database.Statement;
48:   familyMembers: Database.Statement;
49:   conflictsOutgoing: Database.Statement;
50:   conflictsIncoming: Database.Statement;
51:   outgoingAny: Database.Statement;
52:   incomingAny: Database.Statement;
53:   hubSkills: Database.Statement;
54:   orphans: Database.Statement;
55: }
56: 
57: interface RelationRow {
58:   edge_id: number;
59:   edge_source_id: string;
60:   edge_target_id: string;
61:   edge_type: SkillEdge['edgeType'];
62:   edge_weight: number;
63:   edge_context: string;
64:   node_id: string;
65:   node_family: SkillNode['family'];
66:   node_category: string;
67:   node_schema_version: 1 | 2;
68:   node_domains: string | null;
69:   node_intent_signals: string | null;
70:   node_derived: string | null;
71:   node_source_path: string;
72:   node_content_hash: string;
73:   node_indexed_at: string | null;
74: }
75: 
76: const MAX_TRANSITIVE_DEPTH = 8;
77: const preparedStatementCache = new WeakMap<Database.Database, PreparedStatements>();
78: 
79: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
80: // 2. PREPARED STATEMENTS
81: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
82: 
83: function getPreparedStatements(database: Database.Database = getDb()): PreparedStatements {
84:   const cached = preparedStatementCache.get(database);
85:   if (cached) {
86:     return cached;
87:   }
88: 
89:   const selectRelationColumns = `
90:     e.id AS edge_id,
91:     e.source_id AS edge_source_id,
92:     e.target_id AS edge_target_id,
93:     e.edge_type AS edge_type,
94:     e.weight AS edge_weight,
95:     e.context AS edge_context,
96:     n.id AS node_id,
97:     n.family AS node_family,
98:     n.category AS node_category,
99:     n.schema_version AS node_schema_version,
100:     n.domains AS node_domains,
101:     n.intent_signals AS node_intent_signals,
102:     n.derived AS node_derived,
103:     n.source_path AS node_source_path,
104:     n.content_hash AS node_content_hash,
105:     n.indexed_at AS node_indexed_at
106:   `;
107: 
108:   const statements: PreparedStatements = {
109:     nodeById: database.prepare('SELECT * FROM skill_nodes WHERE id = ?'),
110:     dependsOn: database.prepare(`
111:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
112:       FROM skill_edges e
113:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.target_id
114:       WHERE e.source_id = ? AND e.edge_type = 'depends_on'
115:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
116:     `),
117:     dependents: database.prepare(`
118:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
119:       FROM skill_edges e
120:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.source_id
121:       WHERE e.target_id = ? AND e.edge_type = 'depends_on'
122:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
123:     `),
124:     enhances: database.prepare(`
125:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
126:       FROM skill_edges e
127:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.target_id
128:       WHERE e.source_id = ? AND e.edge_type = 'enhances'
129:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
130:     `),
131:     enhancedBy: database.prepare(`
132:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
133:       FROM skill_edges e
134:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.source_id
135:       WHERE e.target_id = ? AND e.edge_type = 'enhances'
136:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
137:     `),
138:     familyMembers: database.prepare(`
139:       SELECT *
140:       FROM skill_nodes
141:       WHERE family = ?
142:       ORDER BY id ASC
143:     `),
144:     conflictsOutgoing: database.prepare(`
145:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
146:       FROM skill_edges e
147:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.target_id
148:       WHERE e.source_id = ? AND e.edge_type = 'conflicts_with'
149:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
150:     `),
151:     conflictsIncoming: database.prepare(`
152:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
153:       FROM skill_edges e
154:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.source_id
155:       WHERE e.target_id = ? AND e.edge_type = 'conflicts_with'
156:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
157:     `),
158:     outgoingAny: database.prepare(`
159:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
160:       FROM skill_edges e
161:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.target_id
162:       WHERE e.source_id = ?
163:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
164:     `),
165:     incomingAny: database.prepare(`
166:       SELECT ${selectRelationColumns}
167:       FROM skill_edges e
168:       INNER JOIN skill_nodes n ON n.id = e.source_id
169:       WHERE e.target_id = ?
170:       ORDER BY e.weight DESC, n.id ASC
171:     `),
172:     hubSkills: database.prepare(`
173:       SELECT
174:         n.*,
175:         COUNT(e.id) AS inbound_count
176:       FROM skill_nodes n
177:       INNER JOIN skill_edges e ON e.target_id = n.id
178:       GROUP BY n.id
179:       HAVING COUNT(e.id) >= ?
180:       ORDER BY inbound_count DESC, n.id ASC
181:     `),
182:     orphans: database.prepare(`
183:       SELECT n.*
184:       FROM skill_nodes n
185:       LEFT JOIN skill_edges outgoing ON outgoing.source_id = n.id
186:       LEFT JOIN skill_edges incoming ON incoming.target_id = n.id
187:       WHERE outgoing.id IS NULL AND incoming.id IS NULL
188:       ORDER BY n.id ASC
189:     `),
190:   };
191: 
192:   preparedStatementCache.set(database, statements);
193:   return statements;
194: }
195: 
196: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
197: // 3. HELPERS
198: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
199: 
200: function relationRowToResult(row: RelationRow, direction: 'inbound' | 'outbound'): SkillGraphRelation {
201:   return {
202:     direction,
203:     edge: rowToSkillEdge({
204:       id: row.edge_id,
205:       source_id: row.edge_source_id,
206:       target_id: row.edge_target_id,
207:       edge_type: row.edge_type,
208:       weight: row.edge_weight,
209:       context: row.edge_context,
210:     }),
211:     node: rowToSkillNode({
212:       id: row.node_id,
213:       family: row.node_family,
214:       category: row.node_category,
215:       schema_version: row.node_schema_version,
216:       domains: row.node_domains,
217:       intent_signals: row.node_intent_signals,
218:       derived: row.node_derived,
219:       source_path: row.node_source_path,
220:       content_hash: row.node_content_hash,
221:       indexed_at: row.node_indexed_at,
222:     }),
223:   };
224: }
225: 
226: function getNodeById(skillId: string, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillNode | null {
227:   const row = getPreparedStatements(database).nodeById.get(skillId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
228:   return row ? rowToSkillNode(row) : null;
229: }
230: 
231: function dedupeRelations(relations: SkillGraphRelation[]): SkillGraphRelation[] {
232:   const deduped = new Map<string, SkillGraphRelation>();
233:   for (const relation of relations) {
234:     const key = relation.edge.id !== undefined
235:       ? String(relation.edge.id)
236:       : `${relation.edge.sourceId}:${relation.edge.edgeType}:${relation.edge.targetId}`;
237:     if (!deduped.has(key)) {
238:       deduped.set(key, relation);
239:     }
240:   }
241:   return [...deduped.values()];
242: }
243: 
244: function edgeKey(edge: SkillEdge): string {
245:   return edge.id !== undefined
246:     ? String(edge.id)
247:     : `${edge.sourceId}:${edge.edgeType}:${edge.targetId}`;
248: }
249: 
250: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
251: // 4. QUERIES
252: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
253: 
254: /** Get the skills a given skill depends on. */
255: export function dependsOn(skillId: string, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillGraphRelation[] {
256:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).dependsOn.all(skillId) as RelationRow[];
257:   return rows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'outbound'));
258: }
259: 
260: /** Get the skills that depend on a given skill. */
261: export function dependents(skillId: string, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillGraphRelation[] {
262:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).dependents.all(skillId) as RelationRow[];
263:   return rows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'inbound'));
264: }
265: 
266: /** Get the skills enhanced by a given skill. */
267: export function enhances(skillId: string, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillGraphRelation[] {
268:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).enhances.all(skillId) as RelationRow[];
269:   return rows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'outbound'));
270: }
271: 
272: /** Get the skills that enhance a given skill. */
273: export function enhancedBy(skillId: string, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillGraphRelation[] {
274:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).enhancedBy.all(skillId) as RelationRow[];
275:   return rows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'inbound'));
276: }
277: 
278: /** Get all skill nodes for a given family. */
279: export function familyMembers(family: SkillFamily, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillNode[] {
280:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).familyMembers.all(family) as Record<string, unknown>[];
281:   return rows.map(rowToSkillNode);
282: }
283: 
284: /** Get all conflict relationships for a given skill, regardless of direction. */
285: export function conflicts(skillId: string, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillGraphRelation[] {
286:   const statements = getPreparedStatements(database);
287:   const outgoingRows = statements.conflictsOutgoing.all(skillId) as RelationRow[];
288:   const incomingRows = statements.conflictsIncoming.all(skillId) as RelationRow[];
289: 
290:   return dedupeRelations([
291:     ...outgoingRows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'outbound')),
292:     ...incomingRows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'inbound')),
293:   ]);
294: }
295: 
296: /** Find the shortest outbound relationship path between two skills. */
297: export function transitivePath(
298:   fromSkillId: string,
299:   toSkillId: string,
300:   database: Database.Database = getDb(),
301: ): SkillGraphPath | null {
302:   const startNode = getNodeById(fromSkillId, database);
303:   const targetNode = getNodeById(toSkillId, database);
304:   if (!startNode || !targetNode) {
305:     return null;
306:   }
307: 
308:   if (fromSkillId === toSkillId) {
309:     return { nodes: [startNode], edges: [] };
310:   }
311: 
312:   const statements = getPreparedStatements(database);
313:   const nodeCache = new Map<string, SkillNode>([
314:     [startNode.id, startNode],
315:     [targetNode.id, targetNode],
316:   ]);
317:   const queue: Array<{ nodeIds: string[]; edges: SkillEdge[] }> = [
318:     { nodeIds: [fromSkillId], edges: [] },
319:   ];
320:   const visited = new Set<string>([fromSkillId]);
321: 
322:   while (queue.length > 0) {
323:     const current = queue.shift()!;
324:     const currentId = current.nodeIds[current.nodeIds.length - 1];
325:     if (current.edges.length >= MAX_TRANSITIVE_DEPTH) {
326:       continue;
327:     }
328: 
329:     const rows = statements.outgoingAny.all(currentId) as RelationRow[];
330:     for (const row of rows) {
331:       const relation = relationRowToResult(row, 'outbound');
332:       nodeCache.set(relation.node.id, relation.node);
333: 
334:       if (visited.has(relation.node.id)) {
335:         continue;
336:       }
337: 
338:       const nextNodeIds = [...current.nodeIds, relation.node.id];
339:       const nextEdges = [...current.edges, relation.edge];
340:       if (relation.node.id === toSkillId) {
341:         return {
342:           nodes: nextNodeIds.map((nodeId) => nodeCache.get(nodeId) ?? getNodeById(nodeId, database)).filter(
343:             (node): node is SkillNode => node !== null,
344:           ),
345:           edges: nextEdges,
346:         };
347:       }
348: 
349:       visited.add(relation.node.id);
350:       queue.push({ nodeIds: nextNodeIds, edges: nextEdges });
351:     }
352:   }
353: 
354:   return null;
355: }
356: 
357: /** Get skills with at least the requested inbound edge count. */
358: export function hubSkills(minInbound: number = 1, database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillGraphHub[] {
359:   const safeMinInbound = Number.isFinite(minInbound) ? Math.max(1, Math.trunc(minInbound)) : 1;
360:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).hubSkills.all(safeMinInbound) as Array<Record<string, unknown> & {
361:     inbound_count: number;
362:   }>;
363: 
364:   return rows.map((row) => ({
365:     node: rowToSkillNode(row),
366:     inboundCount: row.inbound_count,
367:   }));
368: }
369: 
370: /** Get skills that have no inbound or outbound edges. */
371: export function orphans(database: Database.Database = getDb()): SkillNode[] {
372:   const rows = getPreparedStatements(database).orphans.all() as Record<string, unknown>[];
373:   return rows.map(rowToSkillNode);
374: }
375: 
376: /** Get an N-hop neighborhood around a skill, traversing inbound and outbound relationships. */
377: export function subgraph(
378:   skillId: string,
379:   depth: number = 1,
380:   database: Database.Database = getDb(),
381: ): SkillGraphSubgraph {
382:   const root = getNodeById(skillId, database);
383:   if (!root) {
384:     return { nodes: [], edges: [] };
385:   }
386: 
387:   const safeDepth = Number.isFinite(depth) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(Math.trunc(depth), MAX_TRANSITIVE_DEPTH)) : 1;
388:   const statements = getPreparedStatements(database);
389:   const nodes = new Map<string, SkillNode>([[root.id, root]]);
390:   const edges = new Map<string, SkillEdge>();
391:   const visited = new Set<string>([root.id]);
392:   const queue: Array<{ skillId: string; depth: number }> = [{ skillId: root.id, depth: 0 }];
393: 
394:   while (queue.length > 0) {
395:     const current = queue.shift()!;
396:     if (current.depth >= safeDepth) {
397:       continue;
398:     }
399: 
400:     const outgoingRows = statements.outgoingAny.all(current.skillId) as RelationRow[];
401:     const incomingRows = statements.incomingAny.all(current.skillId) as RelationRow[];
402:     const relations = [
403:       ...outgoingRows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'outbound')),
404:       ...incomingRows.map((row) => relationRowToResult(row, 'inbound')),
405:     ];
406: 
407:     for (const relation of relations) {
408:       nodes.set(relation.node.id, relation.node);
409:       edges.set(edgeKey(relation.edge), relation.edge);
410: 
411:       if (visited.has(relation.node.id)) {
412:         continue;
413:       }
414: 
415:       visited.add(relation.node.id);
416:       queue.push({
417:         skillId: relation.node.id,
418:         depth: current.depth + 1,
419:       });
420:     }
421:   }
422: 
423:   return {
424:     nodes: [...nodes.values()].sort((left, right) => left.id.localeCompare(right.id)),
425:     edges: [...edges.values()].sort((left, right) => {
426:       const sourceOrder = left.sourceId.localeCompare(right.sourceId);
427:       if (sourceOrder !== 0) return sourceOrder;
428:       const typeOrder = left.edgeType.localeCompare(right.edgeType);
429:       if (typeOrder !== 0) return typeOrder;
430:       return left.targetId.localeCompare(right.targetId);
431:     }),
432:   };
433: }

1: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // MODULE: Advisor Daemon Lease

4: 
5: import Database from 'better-sqlite3';
6: import { chmodSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, realpathSync } from 'node:fs';
7: import { dirname, join, resolve } from 'node:path';
8: 
9: export interface LeaseOptions {

11:   readonly leaseDbPath?: string;
12:   readonly ownerId?: string;
13:   readonly staleAfterMs?: number;
14:   readonly heartbeatMs?: number;
15:   readonly now?: () => number;
16: }
17: 
18: export interface LeaseAcquireResult {
19:   readonly acquired: boolean;
20:   readonly ownerId: string;
21:   readonly reason: 'acquired' | 'held_by_other';
22:   readonly incumbentOwnerId: string | null;
23:   readonly staleReclaimed: boolean;
24: }
25: 
26: export interface LeaseSnapshot {
27:   readonly workspaceKey: string;
28:   readonly ownerId: string;
29:   readonly pid: number;
30:   readonly acquiredAt: number;
31:   readonly heartbeatAt: number;
32:   readonly startedAt: string;

35: export interface LeaseHeldResult {

37:   readonly ownerPid: number | null;
38:   readonly staleReclaimable: boolean;
39:   readonly startedAt: string | null;
40:   readonly legacyPath?: string | null;
41: }
42: 
43: export interface SkillGraphLease {
44:   readonly ownerId: string;
45:   readonly acquired: boolean;
46:   readonly result: LeaseAcquireResult;
47:   heartbeat: () => void;
48:   release: () => void;
49:   close: () => void;
50: }
51: 
52: const DEFAULT_STALE_AFTER_MS = 30_000;
53: const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_MS = 5_000;
54: const LEASE_DB_FILENAME = 'skill-graph-daemon-lease.sqlite';
55: const LEGACY_LEASE_RELATIVE_PATH = join(
56:   '.opencode',
57:   'skills',
58:   '.advisor-state',
59:   LEASE_DB_FILENAME,
60: );
61: 
62: interface OpenLeaseDatabaseOptions {
63:   readonly readonly?: boolean;
64: }
65: 
66: function canonicalizePath(pathValue: string): string {
67:   const resolvedPath = resolve(pathValue);
68:   try {
69:     return realpathSync.native(resolvedPath);
70:   } catch (error: unknown) {
71:     if ((error as NodeJS.ErrnoException).code === 'ENOENT') {
72:       return resolvedPath;
73:     }
74:     throw error;
75:   }
76: }
77: 
78: function ensureCanonicalDir(dirPath: string): string {
79:   mkdirSync(canonicalizePath(dirPath), { recursive: true, mode: 0o700 });
80:   return canonicalizePath(dirPath);
81: }
82: 
83: function resolveSkillAdvisorDbDir(workspaceRoot: string): string {
84:   const overrideDbDir = process.env.MK_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR ?? process.env.SYSTEM_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR;
85:   if (overrideDbDir) {
86:     return canonicalizePath(overrideDbDir);
87:   }
88:   return canonicalizePath(join(
89:     canonicalizePath(workspaceRoot),
90:     '.opencode',
91:     'skills',
92:     'system-skill-advisor',
93:     'mcp_server',
94:     'database',
95:   ));
96: }
97: 
98: function defaultLeaseDbPath(workspaceRoot: string): string {
99:   return join(resolveSkillAdvisorDbDir(workspaceRoot), LEASE_DB_FILENAME);
100: }
101: 
102: function resolveLeaseDbPath(workspaceRoot: string, leaseDbPath?: string): string {
103:   return leaseDbPath ? canonicalizePath(leaseDbPath) : defaultLeaseDbPath(workspaceRoot);
104: }
105: 
106: function legacyLeaseDbPath(workspaceRoot: string): string {
107:   return canonicalizePath(join(canonicalizePath(workspaceRoot), LEGACY_LEASE_RELATIVE_PATH));
108: }
109: 
110: function workspaceKey(workspaceRoot: string, leaseDbPath?: string): string {
111:   return dirname(resolveLeaseDbPath(workspaceRoot, leaseDbPath));
112: }
113: 
114: function legacyWorkspaceKey(workspaceRoot: string): string {
115:   return resolve(workspaceRoot);
116: }
117: 
118: function createOwnerId(): string {
119:   return `${process.pid}:${Date.now()}:${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`;
120: }
121: 
122: function ensureSchema(db: Database.Database): void {
123:   db.exec(`
124:     PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
125:     CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_graph_daemon_lease (
126:       workspace_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
127:       owner_id TEXT NOT NULL,
128:       pid INTEGER NOT NULL,
129:       acquired_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
130:       heartbeat_at INTEGER NOT NULL
131:     );
132:   `);
133: }
134: 
135: export function openLeaseDatabase(
136:   workspaceRoot: string,
137:   leaseDbPath?: string,

204:   workspaceRoot: string,
205:   leaseDbPath: string | undefined,
206:   key: string,
207:   legacyPath: string | null = null,
208: ): LeaseHeldResult {
209:   if (!existsSync(resolveLeaseDbPath(workspaceRoot, leaseDbPath))) {

291: export function acquireSkillGraphLease(options: LeaseOptions): SkillGraphLease {
292:   const ownerId = options.ownerId ?? createOwnerId();
293:   const staleAfterMs = options.staleAfterMs ?? DEFAULT_STALE_AFTER_MS;
294:   const heartbeatMs = options.heartbeatMs ?? DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_MS;
295:   const now = options.now ?? (() => Date.now());
296:   const db = openLeaseDatabase(options.workspaceRoot, options.leaseDbPath);
297:   const workspace = workspaceKey(options.workspaceRoot, options.leaseDbPath);
298:   let acquired = false;
299: 
300:   const reserve = db.transaction((): LeaseAcquireResult => {
301:     const currentTime = now();
302:     const row = db.prepare(`
303:       SELECT owner_id, heartbeat_at
304:       FROM skill_graph_daemon_lease
305:       WHERE workspace_key = ?
306:     `).get(workspace) as { owner_id: string; heartbeat_at: number } | undefined;
307: 
308:     const staleReclaimed = Boolean(row && currentTime - row.heartbeat_at >= staleAfterMs);
309:     if (row && !staleReclaimed && row.owner_id !== ownerId) {
310:       return {
311:         acquired: false,
312:         ownerId,
313:         reason: 'held_by_other',
314:         incumbentOwnerId: row.owner_id,
315:         staleReclaimed: false,
316:       };
317:     }
318: 
319:     db.prepare(`
320:       INSERT INTO skill_graph_daemon_lease (workspace_key, owner_id, pid, acquired_at, heartbeat_at)
321:       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
322:       ON CONFLICT(workspace_key) DO UPDATE SET
323:         owner_id = excluded.owner_id,
324:         pid = excluded.pid,
325:         acquired_at = excluded.acquired_at,
326:         heartbeat_at = excluded.heartbeat_at
327:     `).run(workspace, ownerId, process.pid, currentTime, currentTime);
328: 
329:     return {
330:       acquired: true,
331:       ownerId,
332:       reason: 'acquired',
333:       incumbentOwnerId: row?.owner_id ?? null,
334:       staleReclaimed,
335:     };
336:   });
337: 
338:   const result = reserve();
339:   acquired = result.acquired;
340:   let heartbeatTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
341: 
342:   function heartbeat(): void {
343:     if (!acquired) return;
344:     const currentTime = now();
345:     const result = db.prepare(`
346:       UPDATE skill_graph_daemon_lease
347:       SET heartbeat_at = ?, pid = ?
348:       WHERE workspace_key = ? AND owner_id = ?
349:     `).run(currentTime, process.pid, workspace, ownerId);
350:     if (result.changes === 0) {
351:       acquired = false;
352:     }
353:   }
354: 
355:   function release(): void {
356:     if (!acquired) return;
357:     const result = db.prepare('DELETE FROM skill_graph_daemon_lease WHERE workspace_key = ? AND owner_id = ?')
358:       .run(workspace, ownerId);
359:     if (result.changes === 0) {
360:       acquired = false;
361:       return;
362:     }
363:     acquired = false;
364:   }
365: 
366:   function close(): void {
367:     if (heartbeatTimer) {
368:       clearInterval(heartbeatTimer);
369:       heartbeatTimer = null;
370:     }
371:     release();
372:     db.close();
373:   }
374: 
375:   if (acquired && heartbeatMs > 0) {
376:     heartbeatTimer = setInterval(heartbeat, heartbeatMs);
377:     heartbeatTimer.unref?.();
378:   }
379: 
380:   return {
381:     ownerId,
382:     get acquired() {
383:       return acquired;
384:     },
385:     result,
386:     heartbeat,
387:     release,
388:     close,
389:   };
390: }
